convert-pdf-to-docx-preserve-layout.title: Convert PDF to DOCX with Layout Preservation
convert-pdf-to-docx-preserve-layout.description: Demonstrates how to convert a PDF file to a DOCX document using Aspose.Pdf while preserving the original layout via standard recognition mode.

convert-pdf-to-docx-enhanced-recognition.title: Convert PDF to DOCX with Enhanced Table and Graphic Recognition
convert-pdf-to-docx-enhanced-recognition.description: Demonstrates how to convert a PDF file to a DOCX document using Aspose.Pdf with the EnhancedFlow recognition mode to better handle complex tables and graphics.

convert-pdf-to-doc-default.title: Convert PDF to DOC with Default Settings
convert-pdf-to-doc-default.description: Shows how to load a PDF and save it as a DOC file using Aspose.Pdf with default text extraction options.

convert-pdf-to-doc-custom-recognition.title: Convert PDF to DOC with Images Using Custom Recognition Mode
convert-pdf-to-doc-custom-recognition.description: Demonstrates converting a PDF file to a DOC document with Aspose.Pdf while preserving images by using the Flow recognition mode and setting a higher image resolution.

convert-pdf-to-docx-auto-detection.title: Convert PDF to DOCX with Automatic Content Detection
convert-pdf-to-docx-auto-detection.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF using Aspose.Pdf and saving it as a DOCX with DocSaveOptions set to RecognitionMode.Flow for automatic content detection.

convert-pdf-to-doc-text-mode.title: Convert PDF to DOC Using Textbox Mode
convert-pdf-to-doc-text-mode.description: Loads a PDF file, configures DocSaveOptions to use the Textbox recognition mode for plain‑text extraction, and saves the document as a DOC file.

convert-pdf-to-docx-with-metadata.title: Convert PDF to DOCX with Custom Metadata
convert-pdf-to-docx-with-metadata.description: Shows how to load a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, set author and title metadata, and convert it to a DOCX file with specific save options.

convert-pdf-to-docx-with-footnotes.title: Convert PDF to DOCX with Footnote Preservation
convert-pdf-to-docx-with-footnotes.description: Demonstrates converting a PDF file to DOCX using Aspose.Pdf while enabling enhanced flow recognition to preserve footnotes.

convert-pdf-to-docx-extract-images.title: Convert PDF to DOCX and Extract Embedded Images
convert-pdf-to-docx-extract-images.description: Demonstrates how to convert a PDF file to DOCX format using Aspose.Pdf and then iterate through each page to extract all embedded images into a specified folder.

pdf-to-docx-conversion-json-report.title: PDF to DOCX Conversion with JSON Report
pdf-to-docx-conversion-json-report.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, converting it to DOCX using DocSaveOptions, and generating a JSON report that captures conversion statistics such as file sizes, page counts, and elapsed time.

convert-pdf-to-docx-and-zip.title: Convert PDF to DOCX and Zip the Result
convert-pdf-to-docx-and-zip.description: Demonstrates converting a PDF file to DOCX using Aspose.Pdf and then compressing the generated DOCX into a ZIP archive for storage.

pdf-to-docx-to-pdfa-conversion.title: Convert PDF to DOCX and then to PDF/A
pdf-to-docx-to-pdfa-conversion.description: Demonstrates converting a PDF file to DOCX with Aspose.Pdf, then loading the DOCX and creating a PDF/A‑1B compliant document.

convert-pdf-to-docx-with-hyphenation.title: Convert PDF to DOCX with Language‑Specific Hyphenation
convert-pdf-to-docx-with-hyphenation.description: Shows how to load a PDF, set its language to enable hyphenation, configure DOCX save options, and save the document as a DOCX file using Aspose.Pdf.

convert-pdf-to-docx-with-table-of-figure.title: Convert PDF to DOCX with Table of Figures
convert-pdf-to-docx-with-table-of-figure.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, creating a tagged Table of Figures from extracted images, and saving the result as a DOCX document.

convert-pdf-to-docx-with-embedded-fonts.title: Convert PDF to DOCX with Embedded Fonts
convert-pdf-to-docx-with-embedded-fonts.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, configuring DocSaveOptions to embed fonts, and saving the document as a DOCX file.

convert-pdf-to-pptx.title: Convert PDF to PPTX
convert-pdf-to-pptx.description: Demonstrates converting a PDF document to an editable PowerPoint (PPTX) file using Aspose.Pdf with default save options.

convert-pdf-to-pptx-slides-as-images.title: Convert PDF to PPTX with Slides as Images
convert-pdf-to-pptx-slides-as-images.description: Demonstrates how to convert a PDF file to a PPTX presentation using Aspose.Pdf, with each slide rendered as a raster image by enabling the SlidesAsImages option.

convert-pdf-to-pptx-with-progress-handle.title: Convert PDF to PPTX with Custom Progress Handler
convert-pdf-to-pptx-with-progress-handle.description: Shows how to convert a PDF file to PPTX using Aspose.Pdf while attaching a custom progress handler to receive conversion status updates.

batch-convert-pdfs-to-pptx-slidesasimage.title: Batch Convert PDFs to PPTX with SlidesAsImages
batch-convert-pdfs-to-pptx-slidesasimage.description: Demonstrates how to convert multiple PDF files in a folder to PPTX format, rendering each slide as an image by enabling the SlidesAsImages option.

convert-pdf-to-pptx-with-progress.title: Convert PDF to PPTX with Custom Progress Handler
convert-pdf-to-pptx-with-progress.description: Demonstrates converting a PDF to PPTX using Aspose.Pdf while attaching a custom progress handler to log conversion progress events.

convert-pdf-to-pptx-slidesasimages-high-.title: Convert PDF to PPTX with SlidesAsImages and High DPI
convert-pdf-to-pptx-slidesasimages-high-.description: Demonstrates converting a PDF document to a PPTX presentation where each slide is rendered as an image, using a specified image resolution (DPI) for high‑quality output.

convert-pdf-to-pptx-and-compress.title: Convert PDF to PPTX and Compress the Resulting File
convert-pdf-to-pptx-and-compress.description: Demonstrates converting a PDF document to a PPTX presentation using Aspose.Pdf and then recompressing the PPTX (a ZIP archive) to reduce its file size for distribution.

convert-pdf-to-pptx-optional-password-pr.title: Convert PDF to PPTX with Optional Password Protection
convert-pdf-to-pptx-optional-password-pr.description: Demonstrates converting a PDF file to a PPTX presentation using Aspose.Pdf and shows how to apply password protection with Aspose.Slides if the library is available.

convert-pdf-to-pptx-to-pdfa.title: Convert PDF to PPTX and then to PDF/A
convert-pdf-to-pptx-to-pdfa.description: Demonstrates converting a PDF file to PPTX using Aspose.Pdf, then converting the PPTX to a PDF/A‑1B file for archival compliance.

convert-pdf-to-pptx-with-notes.title: Convert PDF to PPTX and Export Annotation Notes
convert-pdf-to-pptx-with-notes.description: Shows how to convert a PDF file to PPTX using Aspose.Pdf, extract annotation contents from each PDF page, and output them as speaker notes for the corresponding slides.

convert-pdf-to-pptx-add-custom-propertie.title: Convert PDF to PPTX and Add Custom Document Properties
convert-pdf-to-pptx-add-custom-propertie.description: Demonstrates converting a PDF file to PPTX using Aspose.Pdf while setting both standard and custom document properties before saving.

convert-pdf-to-pptx-with-custom-font.title: Convert PDF to PPTX with Custom Font Embedding
convert-pdf-to-pptx-with-custom-font.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, configuring a fallback font, and saving it as a PPTX presentation where the custom font is embedded for consistent appearance.

convert-pdf-to-pptx__v2.title: Convert PDF to PPTX using Aspose.Pdf
convert-pdf-to-pptx__v2.description: Shows how to convert a PDF document to a PowerPoint PPTX file programmatically with Aspose.Pdf's Document class and Save method.

convert-pdf-to-pptx-extract-images.title: Convert PDF to PPTX and Extract Images from Slides
convert-pdf-to-pptx-extract-images.description: Demonstrates converting a PDF file to a PPTX presentation using Aspose.Pdf and then extracting the slide images by reading the PPTX package as a ZIP archive.

convert-pdf-to-pptx-extract-slide-titles.title: Convert PDF to PPTX and Export Slide Titles to CSV
convert-pdf-to-pptx-extract-slide-titles.description: Loads a PDF, converts it to a PPTX file using Aspose.Pdf, then extracts the first non‑empty line from each page as a slide title and writes slide numbers with titles to a CSV file.

add-logo-to-pdf-and-convert-to-pptx.title: Add Logo to PDF and Convert to PPTX
add-logo-to-pdf-and-convert-to-pptx.description: Loads a PDF, stamps a semi‑transparent company logo on each page, and then converts the modified document to a PPTX file using Aspose.Pdf.

convert-pdf-to-pptx__v3.title: Convert PDF to PPTX
convert-pdf-to-pptx__v3.description: Shows how to convert a PDF document to a PowerPoint PPTX file using Aspose.Pdf's Document class and Save method.

convert-pdf-to-single-page-html.title: Convert PDF to Single-Page HTML
convert-pdf-to-single-page-html.description: Shows how to load a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf and save it as a single HTML file that contains all pages while preserving the original formatting and fonts.

convert-pdf-to-multi-page-html.title: Convert PDF to Multi-Page HTML with SplitIntoPages
convert-pdf-to-multi-page-html.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, configuring HtmlSaveOptions to split the output into separate HTML files per page, and saving the result.

convert-pdf-to-html-with-svg-images.title: Convert PDF to HTML with SVG Images Saved to Folder
convert-pdf-to-html-with-svg-images.description: Demonstrates converting a PDF to HTML using Aspose.Pdf, saving raster images as external PNG files referenced via SVG and storing the generated SVG images in a specified folder.

convert-pdf-to-html-with-svg-compression.title: Convert PDF to HTML with SVG Compression
convert-pdf-to-html-with-svg-compression.description: Shows how to convert a PDF file to HTML using Aspose.Pdf and enable SVG graphics compression to reduce the size of embedded SVG images.

convert-pdf-to-html-png-page-background.title: Convert PDF to HTML with PNG Page Backgrounds
convert-pdf-to-html-png-page-background.description: Demonstrates how to convert a PDF document to HTML while embedding each page's background images as a single PNG. Uses Aspose.Pdf's HtmlSaveOptions to control raster image saving mode.

convert-pdf-pages-to-html.title: Convert PDF Pages to Separate HTML Files
convert-pdf-pages-to-html.description: Demonstrates how to convert each page of a PDF into an individual HTML file using Aspose.Pdf's HtmlSaveOptions with SplitIntoPages enabled.

pdf-to-html-with-toc.title: Convert PDF to HTML and Add a Table of Contents
pdf-to-html-with-toc.description: Demonstrates converting a PDF file to a single‑file HTML document using Aspose.Pdf, then generating a navigable table of contents by adding IDs to headings and inserting a TOC block.

convert-pdf-to-html-per-page-image-subfo.title: Convert PDF to HTML with Per-Page Image Subfolders
convert-pdf-to-html-per-page-image-subfo.description: Demonstrates converting a PDF to HTML using Aspose.Pdf while storing each page's raster images in separate subfolders via a custom resource-saving strategy.

convert-pdf-to-html-compressed-svg.title: Convert PDF to HTML with Compressed SVG Images
convert-pdf-to-html-compressed-svg.description: Demonstrates converting a PDF document to HTML using Aspose.Pdf while enabling the CompressSvgGraphicsIfAny option to generate compressed SVG assets.

convert-pdf-to-html-png-page-background_.title: Convert PDF to HTML with PNG Page Backgrounds
convert-pdf-to-html-png-page-background_.description: Demonstrates how to convert a PDF document to HTML while rendering each page's background as an embedded PNG image using Aspose.Pdf.

pdf-to-html-roundtrip-conversion.title: PDF to HTML Round‑Trip Conversion
pdf-to-html-roundtrip-conversion.description: Shows how to convert a PDF to a single HTML file with embedded resources using Aspose.Pdf, then load that HTML and save it back to PDF, including basic error handling.

convert-pdf-to-html-zip-archive.title: Convert PDF to HTML and Package into ZIP Archive
convert-pdf-to-html-zip-archive.description: Demonstrates converting a PDF into split HTML pages with external assets using Aspose.Pdf, then bundling the HTML files and assets into a ZIP file for distribution.

convert-pdf-to-html-and-minify.title: Convert PDF to HTML and Minify the Result
convert-pdf-to-html-and-minify.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, optimizing it, converting it to a single HTML file, and then minifying the HTML to reduce size for faster web loading.

convert-pdf-to-html-with-custom-font.title: Convert PDF to HTML with Custom Font Embedding
convert-pdf-to-html-with-custom-font.description: Shows how to convert a PDF to HTML using Aspose.Pdf and embed a custom WOFF font via a generated @font-face rule in the CSS.

convert-pdf-to-responsive-html.title: Convert PDF to Responsive HTML with CSS
convert-pdf-to-responsive-html.description: Shows how to convert a PDF document to HTML using Aspose.Pdf and then inject a responsive CSS stylesheet to create a mobile‑friendly layout.

convert-pdf-to-html-with-custom-css.title: Convert PDF to HTML with Custom CSS
convert-pdf-to-html-with-custom-css.description: Shows how to convert a PDF document to HTML using Aspose.Pdf and apply a custom CSS file by providing a custom CSS saving strategy.

pdf-to-html-sitemap.title: Convert PDF to HTML Pages and Generate Sitemap XML
pdf-to-html-sitemap.description: Shows how to convert each page of a PDF into separate HTML files using Aspose.Pdf and then create a sitemap.xml that lists all generated HTML pages for SEO.

convert-pdf-to-html-pages-with-index.title: Convert PDF to HTML Pages and Create Index
convert-pdf-to-html-pages-with-index.description: The example converts a PDF document into separate HTML files—one per page—using Aspose.Pdf, then generates an index.html that links to each generated page.

pdf-to-html-embed-fonts-to-docx.title: Convert PDF to HTML with Embedded Fonts and then to DOCX
pdf-to-html-embed-fonts-to-docx.description: Demonstrates converting a PDF to a single HTML file with all fonts embedded, then loading that HTML and saving it as a DOCX while preserving the fonts.

convert-pdf-to-html-and-pptx.title: Convert PDF to HTML with Embedded Fonts and to PPTX
convert-pdf-to-html-and-pptx.description: Shows how to convert a PDF document to an HTML file with all fonts embedded, then convert the same PDF to a PPTX presentation using Aspose.Pdf.

convert-pdf-to-bmp-images.title: Convert PDF to BMP Images
convert-pdf-to-bmp-images.description: Demonstrates how to convert each page of a PDF document into separate BMP image files using Aspose.Pdf's BmpDevice with default settings.

convert-pdf-to-jpeg-images.title: Convert PDF to JPEG Images
convert-pdf-to-jpeg-images.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf and export each page as a JPEG image using JpegDevice with default quality.

convert-pdf-pages-to-gif.title: Convert PDF Pages to GIF Images
convert-pdf-pages-to-gif.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf and convert each page to a GIF image using the GifDevice with default parameters.

convert-pdf-to-png-transparent-backgroun.title: Convert PDF to PNG with Transparent Background
convert-pdf-to-png-transparent-backgroun.description: Demonstrates how to convert each page of a PDF into PNG images using Aspose.Pdf's ImageDevice with a specified resolution and transparent background.

convert-pdf-to-emf.title: Convert PDF Pages to EMF Images
convert-pdf-to-emf.description: Shows how to load a PDF document and convert each page to a vector EMF image using Aspose.Pdf's EmfDevice.

convert-pdf-to-multi-page-tiff.title: Convert PDF to Multi-Page TIFF using TiffDevice
convert-pdf-to-multi-page-tiff.description: Shows how to load a PDF and convert all its pages into a single multi-page TIFF file with custom resolution and TIFF settings using Aspose.Pdf.

convert-pdf-to-svg.title: Convert PDF to SVG Images
convert-pdf-to-svg.description: Shows how to load a PDF document and save each page as an SVG image using Aspose.Pdf's Document class with default SvgSaveOptions.

convert-pdf-to-multi-page-tiff__v2.title: Convert PDF to Multi-Page TIFF
convert-pdf-to-multi-page-tiff__v2.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf and use TiffDevice to convert all pages into a single multi-page TIFF file using default settings.

convert-pdf-page-region-to-png.title: Convert PDF Page Region to PNG Image
convert-pdf-page-region-to-png.description: Shows how to extract a specific rectangular area from a PDF page and save it as a PNG file using Aspose.Pdf.

convert-pdf-page-to-jpeg.title: Convert PDF Page to JPEG Image
convert-pdf-page-to-jpeg.description: Demonstrates how to convert a specific page of a PDF document to a JPEG image using Aspose.Pdf's JpegDevice with the default DPI.

batch-convert-pdfs-to-png-preserve-hiera.title: Batch Convert PDFs to PNG Preserving Folder Hierarchy
batch-convert-pdfs-to-png-preserve-hiera.description: Shows how to recursively locate PDF files, keep their relative directory structure, and convert each page to PNG images using Aspose.Pdf.

batch-convert-pdfs-to-jpeg-images.title: Batch Convert PDFs to JPEG Images with Custom Naming
batch-convert-pdfs-to-jpeg-images.description: Demonstrates how to enumerate PDF files in a folder, convert each page to a JPEG image using Aspose.Pdf, and save the images with a custom <pdfname>_page<number>.jpeg naming pattern.

batch-convert-pdfs-to-multi-page-tiff.title: Batch Convert PDFs to Multi‑Page TIFF
batch-convert-pdfs-to-multi-page-tiff.description: Shows how to iterate through a folder of PDF files and convert each document into a multi‑page TIFF archive using Aspose.Pdf's Document and TiffDevice classes.

convert-pdf-to-pdfa-1b-and-validate.title: Convert PDF to PDF/A‑1b and Validate
convert-pdf-to-pdfa-1b-and-validate.description: Loads a PDF, converts it to PDF/A‑1b format, validates the result against PDF/A‑1b compliance, and saves the compliant document.

convert-pdf-to-pdfa-3b-with-font-substit.title: Convert PDF to PDF/A‑3b with Font Substitution
convert-pdf-to-pdfa-3b-with-font-substit.description: Demonstrates how to convert a PDF document to PDF/A‑3b compliance using Aspose.Pdf, enabling default font substitution for missing fonts, and saving the resulting file.

convert-pdf-to-pdfa4-with-auto-tagging.title: Convert PDF to PDF/A‑4 with Auto‑Tagging
convert-pdf-to-pdfa4-with-auto-tagging.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, converting it to PDF/A‑4 format while enabling auto‑tagging, and saving the resulting file using Aspose.Pdf.

convert-pdf-to-pdfa1b-skip-errors.title: Convert PDF to PDF/A-1b and Skip Non‑Convertible Elements
convert-pdf-to-pdfa1b-skip-errors.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, configuring PdfFormatConversionOptions to target PDF/A‑1b, setting ConvertErrorAction to skip elements that cannot be converted, performing the conversion, and saving the resulting PDF/A‑1b file.

convert-pdf-to-pdfa-3b-throw-on-error.title: Convert PDF to PDF/A-3b with Throw on Conversion Errors
convert-pdf-to-pdfa-3b-throw-on-error.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, configuring conversion options for PDF/A‑3b with ConvertErrorAction set to throw exceptions on errors, performing the conversion, saving the result, and handling conversion‑specific exceptions.

convert-pdf-to-pdfa4-with-error-action.title: Convert PDF to PDF/A‑4 with Error Conversion Options
convert-pdf-to-pdfa4-with-error-action.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, configuring conversion to PDF/A‑4 with a specific ConvertErrorAction to handle problematic elements, performing the conversion, and saving the result.

add-attachment-to-pdfa3b-document.title: Add File Attachment and Convert to PDF/A‑3b
add-attachment-to-pdfa3b-document.description: Demonstrates how to embed an external text file into a PDF/A‑3b document using Aspose.Pdf, then convert the document to PDF/A‑3b compliance and save it.

add-xml-attachment-to-pdfa1b-document.title: Add XML Attachment to PDF/A-1b Document
add-xml-attachment-to-pdfa1b-document.description: Shows how to convert a PDF to PDF/A‑1b and embed an external XML file as a file‑attachment annotation on a page.

replace-missing-fonts-pdfa-conversion.title: Replace Missing Fonts During PDF/A Conversion with Font Substitution
replace-missing-fonts-pdfa-conversion.description: Demonstrates how to configure font substitution fallback fonts when converting a PDF to PDF/A using Aspose.Pdf, ensuring missing fonts are replaced and embedded correctly.

enable-auto-tagging-pdfa-conversion.title: Enable Auto‑Tagging for PDF/A Conversion
enable-auto-tagging-pdfa-conversion.description: Demonstrates how to enable automatic tagging by setting AutoTaggingSettings on PdfFormatConversionOptions and convert a PDF to PDF/A‑1B using Aspose.Pdf.

convert-epub-to-pdf-custom-page-size.title: Convert EPUB to PDF with Custom Page Size
convert-epub-to-pdf-custom-page-size.description: Demonstrates loading an EPUB file with EpubLoadOptions to set a custom page size and saving it as a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

convert-markdown-to-pdf.title: Convert Markdown to PDF with Code Block Preservation
convert-markdown-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates loading a Markdown file using MdLoadOptions and converting it to a PDF document while preserving code blocks.

convert-pcl-to-pdf-hpgl2.title: Convert PCL to PDF with HP‑GL/2 Vectors
convert-pcl-to-pdf-hpgl2.description: Demonstrates loading a PCL file (including HP‑GL/2 vector graphics) using Aspose.Pdf and saving it as a PDF document.

convert-postscript-to-pdf.title: Convert PostScript to PDF
convert-postscript-to-pdf.description: Shows how to load a PostScript (.ps) file with PsLoadOptions and save it as a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

convert-xml-to-pdf-using-xsl-fo.title: Convert XML to PDF using XSL‑FO with Aspose.Pdf
convert-xml-to-pdf-using-xsl-fo.description: Demonstrates loading an XML file, applying an XSL‑FO stylesheet, and saving the result as a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

convert-xsl-fo-to-pdf.title: Convert XSL‑FO to PDF with Aspose.Pdf
convert-xsl-fo-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates loading an XSL‑FO file (creating a minimal one if missing) and converting it to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf with default conversion options.

convert-latex-to-pdf.title: Convert LaTeX (.tex) to PDF with Aspose.Pdf
convert-latex-to-pdf.description: Shows how to load a .tex file using TeXLoadOptions and convert it to a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.

convert-ofd-to-pdf.title: Convert OFD to PDF
convert-ofd-to-pdf.description: Shows how to load an OFD document using OfdLoadOptions and save it as a PDF with default settings using Aspose.Pdf.

convert-pdf-to-epub.title: Convert PDF to EPUB
convert-pdf-to-epub.description: Shows how to load a PDF document with Aspose.Pdf and save it as an EPUB file using the default conversion settings.

convert-pdf-to-epub-with-cover.title: Convert PDF to EPUB with Custom Cover and Metadata
convert-pdf-to-epub-with-cover.description: Shows how to convert a PDF file to EPUB using Aspose.Pdf, set PDF/EPUB metadata, and optionally attach a cover image.

convert-pdf-to-latex-with-output-directo.title: Convert PDF to LaTeX with Specified Output Directory
convert-pdf-to-latex-with-output-directo.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, configuring TeXSaveOptions to set an output directory, and saving the document as a LaTeX (.tex) file.

convert-pdf-to-latex-with-custom-macros.title: Convert PDF to LaTeX with Custom Macros
convert-pdf-to-latex-with-custom-macros.description: Demonstrates converting a PDF file to LaTeX using Aspose.Pdf and prepending custom macro definitions for special symbols.

convert-pdf-to-text-using-textdevice.title: Convert PDF to Text Using TextDevice
convert-pdf-to-text-using-textdevice.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf and extract its text to a UTF‑8 encoded .txt file using the TextDevice class.

extract-pdf-text-to-utf8-file.title: Extract PDF Text to UTF-8 File with Line Breaks
extract-pdf-text-to-utf8-file.description: Shows how to load a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, extract its text while preserving line breaks with TextAbsorber in Pure mode, and write the result to a UTF-8 encoded text file.

extract-visible-text-from-pdf.title: Extract Visible Text from PDF
extract-visible-text-from-pdf.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, use a TextAbsorber in Pure formatting mode to extract only visible text, and write the result to a .txt file.

convert-pdf-to-xps.title: Convert PDF to XPS using Aspose.Pdf
convert-pdf-to-xps.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF file with Aspose.Pdf and save it as an XPS document using default XpsSaveOptions.

convert-pdf-to-xps-custom-page-size.title: Convert PDF to XPS with Custom Page Size and Orientation
convert-pdf-to-xps-custom-page-size.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, applying a custom page size and landscape/portrait orientation to each page, and saving the result as an XPS document using Aspose.Pdf.

convert-pdf-to-markdown.title: Convert PDF to Markdown
convert-pdf-to-markdown.description: Shows how to load a PDF document with Aspose.Pdf and save it as a Markdown file using the default MarkdownSaveOptions.

convert-pdf-to-markdown-with-custom-head.title: Convert PDF to Markdown with Custom Heading Mapping
convert-pdf-to-markdown-with-custom-head.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, configuring MarkdownSaveOptions to use heuristic heading recognition and a custom heading level threshold, and saving the result as a Markdown file.

convert-pdf-to-mobixml.title: Convert PDF to MobiXML
convert-pdf-to-mobixml.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF file with Aspose.Pdf and save it as a MobiXML document using the default MobiXmlSaveOptions.

convert-pdf-to-mobixml-with-custom-metad.title: Convert PDF to MobiXml with Custom Metadata
convert-pdf-to-mobixml-with-custom-metad.description: Demonstrates converting a PDF to MobiXml format using Aspose.Pdf while setting the standard Author metadata and a custom Publisher metadata field.

pdf-to-png-binarize-bradley.title: Convert PDF Pages to Binarized PNG with Bradley Algorithm
pdf-to-png-binarize-bradley.description: Loads a PDF document, converts each page to a PNG image, applies the Bradley binarization algorithm to enhance contrast, and saves the resulting PNG files to disk.

convert-pdf-to-png-transparent-backgroun.title: Convert PDF Pages to PNG with Transparent Background
convert-pdf-to-png-transparent-backgroun.description: Demonstrates converting each page of a PDF document to PNG images while preserving transparency by enabling the TransparentBackground option of PngDevice.

create-multi-page-tiff-from-pdf.title: Create Multi‑Page TIFF from PDF
create-multi-page-tiff-from-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to convert all pages of a PDF document into a single multi‑page TIFF file using Aspose.Pdf's TiffDevice with default compression.

create-single-page-tiff-from-first-pdf-p.title: Create Single-Page TIFF from First PDF Page
create-single-page-tiff-from-first-pdf-p.description: Demonstrates how to convert the first page of a PDF into a single-page TIFF image using Aspose.Pdf's TiffDevice with custom resolution and compression settings.

convert-pdf-to-svg-with-embedded-css.title: Convert PDF to SVG with Embedded CSS
convert-pdf-to-svg-with-embedded-css.description: Shows how to load a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, configure SvgSaveOptions (which embed CSS by default), and save the document as an SVG file.

convert-pdf-to-svg-with-output-folder.title: Convert PDF to SVG with Custom Output Folder
convert-pdf-to-svg-with-output-folder.description: Demonstrates how to convert a PDF document to SVG files using Aspose.Pdf, creating a dedicated output folder where each page is saved as a separate SVG.
